channel.title: Ashley Jae Carranza
channel.description: News, features, and writing updates from Ashley Jae Carranza.

item.title: Feature Interview: Our Fears Made Manifest
item.description: When my collection Our Fears Made Manifest came out, I did a feature interview with Awesome Gang about the book and the ideas behind it.

item.title: Current Project: A Boy Named Doctor
item.description: I'm currently working toward my MFA in creative writing and completing A Boy Named Doctor, a coming-of-age novel set in the California desert.
